languages.text: "Держи руки на виду, и, может быть, ты доживешь до суда за посягательства на мой титул".
"Keep your hands where I can see them, and perhaps you will live long enough to stand trial for your assault upon my title."
languages.original_text: "Держи руки на виду, и, может быть, ты доживешь до суда за посягательства на мой титул".

traits.locale_text: "Keep your hands where I can see them, and perhaps you will live long enough to stand trial for your assault upon my title."
"Keep your hands where I can see them, and perhaps you will live long enough to stand trial for your assault upon my title."
"Keep your hands where I can see them, and perhaps you will live long enough to stand trial for your assault upon my title."
"Keep your hands where I can see them, and perhaps you will live long enough to stand trial for your assault upon my title."
"Keep your hands where I can see them, and perhaps you will live long enough to stand trial for your assault upon my title."

languages.text: “把手放在我看得见的地方，这样或许你还能活到受审的那天，为侵犯我的头衔受到审判。”
languages.original_text: "Keep your hands where I can see them, and perhaps you will live long enough to stand trial for your assault upon my title."

traits.locale_text: “把手放在我看得见的地方，这样或许你还能活到受审的那天，为侵犯我的头衔受到审判。”

languages.text: «Mantén las manos donde pueda verlas y tal vez vivas lo suficiente como para que te juzguen por atacar mi cargo».
languages.original_text: "Keep your hands where I can see them, and perhaps you will live long enough to stand trial for your assault upon my title."

traits.locale_text: «Mantén las manos donde pueda verlas y tal vez vivas lo suficiente como para que te juzguen por atacar mi cargo».

languages.text: « Gardez vos mains bien en vue, et vous vivrez peut-être assez longtemps pour répondre de vos actes devant un tribunal. »
languages.original_text: "Keep your hands where I can see them, and perhaps you will live long enough to stand trial for your assault upon my title."

traits.locale_text: « Gardez vos mains bien en vue, et vous vivrez peut-être assez longtemps pour répondre de vos actes devant un tribunal. »

languages.text: "Ellerini görebileceğim bir yerde tut, o zaman ünvanıma yaptığın saldırıdan dolayı yargılanacak kadar uzun yaşayabilirsin."
languages.original_text: "Keep your hands where I can see them, and perhaps you will live long enough to stand trial for your assault upon my title."

traits.locale_text: "Ellerini görebileceğim bir yerde tut, o zaman ünvanıma yaptığın saldırıdan dolayı yargılanacak kadar uzun yaşayabilirsin."

languages.text: "Behaltet Eure Hände, wo ich sie sehen kann, dann lebt Ihr vielleicht lange genug, um Euch für den Versuch, meinen Titel zu stehlen, vor Gericht zu verantworten."
languages.original_text: "Keep your hands where I can see them, and perhaps you will live long enough to stand trial for your assault upon my title."

traits.locale_text: "Behaltet Eure Hände, wo ich sie sehen kann, dann lebt Ihr vielleicht lange genug, um Euch für den Versuch, meinen Titel zu stehlen, vor Gericht zu verantworten."

languages.text: 「手は見えるところに置いておいて、そして、私の称号に対する暴行で裁判にかけられるまで生き残るかもしれないわ。」
languages.original_text: "Keep your hands where I can see them, and perhaps you will live long enough to stand trial for your assault upon my title."

traits.locale_text: 「手は見えるところに置いておいて、そして、私の称号に対する暴行で裁判にかけられるまで生き残るかもしれないわ。」
